query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Garner', 'To reap grain, gather it up, and store it in a granary', 'Critics argued that the plan might garner the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Garnish', 'To decorate with ornamental appendages, to adorn', 'Critics argued that the plan might garnish the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Garrison', 'To assign troops to a military post', 'Critics argued that the plan might garrison the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Garrote', 'To execute by strangulation', 'Over time, the community learned to garrote its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Garrulous', 'Excessively talkative', 'What seemed garrulous at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gaseous', 'Relating to, or existing as, gas', 'What seemed gaseous at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gastric', 'Of or relating to the stomach', 'Over time, the community learned to gastric its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gastritis', 'Inflammation of the lining of the stomach', 'The essay highlights the gastritis of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gastronomy', 'The art or science of good eating', 'Scholars noted a striking gastronomy between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gauche', 'Awkward, crude', 'Scholars noted a striking gauche between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gauge', 'To measure or determine capacity, character, or ability', 'The author hoped the new policy would gauge tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gaunt', 'Lean, angular, and bony', 'The essay highlights the gaunt of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gauntlet', 'A medieval glove, as of mail or plate, worn by a knight', 'Her gauntlet became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gendarme', 'A member of the gendarmerie, a policing military body', 'Scholars noted a striking gendarme between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Genealogist', 'A person who studies, professes or practices genealogy', 'Scholars noted a striking genealogist between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Genealogy', 'A record or account of the ancestry and descent of a person', 'The essay highlights the genealogy of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Generality', 'The quality of being general', 'The essay highlights the generality of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Generalize', 'To speak in generalities, or in vague terms', 'Over time, the community learned to generalize its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Generally', 'Usually, commonly, ordinarily', 'He generally overlooked details that later proved decisive.', 'adverb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Generic', 'Very comprehensive, pertaining or appropriate to big groups', 'Critics argued that the plan might generic the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Generosity', 'The trait of being willing to donate money and/or time', 'Over time, the community learned to generosity its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Genesis', 'The origin or point at which something begins to exist', 'The author hoped the new policy would genesis tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Genial', 'Friendly and cheerful', 'The passage presents a genial portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Geniality', 'The quality of being warmly and pleasantly cheerful', 'The essay highlights the geniality of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Genital', 'Of, or relating to biological reproduction', 'The author hoped the new policy would genital tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Genitive', 'The case which expresses origin or possession (grammar)', 'Scholars noted a striking genitive between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Genteel', 'Polite and well-mannered', 'The essay highlights the genteel of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gentile', 'Non-jewish', 'The essay highlights the gentile of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Genuine', 'Truly what something is said to be; authentic', 'The passage presents a genuine portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Geology', 'Science of the structure of the earth through study of rocks', 'Scholars noted a striking geology between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Germane', 'Related to the topic being discussed or considered', 'Critics argued that the plan might germane the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Germinal', 'Pertaining or belonging to a germ', 'The author hoped the new policy would germinal tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Germinate', 'To begin to grow or develop', 'Critics argued that the plan might germinate the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gestation', 'The period of time an infant develops inside the mother', 'Scholars noted a striking gestation between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gesticulate', 'To make gestures or motions, as in speaking, to use postures', 'Critics argued that the plan might gesticulate the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gesture', 'To make a gesture or gestures', 'Over time, the community learned to gesture its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ghastly', 'Horrifyingly shocking', 'She spoke ghastly, leaving little doubt about her position.', 'adverb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Ghoulish', 'Of or pertaining to ghouls', 'Over time, the community learned to ghoulish its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gibber', 'Speaking inarticulately or meaninglessly', 'Scholars noted a striking gibber between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gibe', 'To utter mocking or scoffing words', 'Her gibe became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Giddy', 'To make dizzy or unsteady', 'Critics argued that the plan might giddy the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gigantic', 'Very large', 'What seemed gigantic at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gingerly', 'With great care or caution', 'He gingerly overlooked details that later proved decisive.', 'adverb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Girder', 'A beam of steel, wood,etc, used as a main support', 'Her girder became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gist', 'The most essential part, the main idea or substance', 'Scholars noted a striking gist between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Glacial', 'Of, or relating to glaciers', 'Over time, the community learned to glacial its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Glacier', 'A large body of ice which flows under its own mass', 'Her glacier became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gladden', 'To cause (something) to become glad', 'Critics argued that the plan might gladden the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Glazier', 'A person who fits windows or the like with glass', 'The essay highlights the glazier of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Glean', 'To gather slowly and laboriously, bit by bit', 'Her glean became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
